label_basis: Rest-gated (CI). Downstream named by gene IDENTITY (no curated proteostasis set exists in-repo, so this is identity+cross-decomposition, not a hypergeometric): chaperonin/mito-proteostasis (HSPD1=HSP60, HSPE1=HSP10, TCP1=CCT, PRDX3) + hnRNP RNA-processing (HNRNPA2B1/HNRNPAB/LSM4/ELAVL1); independently recovered as SVD raw-PC1 bottom (5/10 genes). Regulators = TWO coherent modules that do NOT resolve to one complex: AHR-ARNT (xenobiotic/hypoxia sensing; ARNT=HIF-1b) + immune Rac->WAVE->actin axis (NCKAP1L/Hem1, WASF2, DOCK2 Rac-GEF, ARHGAP30 Rac-GAP). rank-test(8/10): SEPARATE - at rank 6 AHR-ARNT and the WAVE-Rac module co-load (fused), but at ranks 8 AND 10 they split into distinct factors (AHR-ARNT alone; DOCK2/NCKAP1L/WASF2/ARHGAP30 re-cohere as their own actin factor at rank 10). So factor 1 is TWO resolvable programs fused by the rank-6 cut, not one coupled program - caveat: these higher-rank factors are in a less-stable regime (matched cosine <0.72).
max_cofactor_cosine=0.966 with factor 5 (degenerate pair); not interpreted.
constitutive(flat), not condition-gated. Regulators SAGA (TADA2B/TAF6L/SUPT20H/SGF29) + Mediator (CCNC/MED19).
constitutive(flat). Regulators BCL10/CD28 + SAGA (TAF6L/SUPT20H); downstream chaperone/mito (HSPD1/CYCS/TRAP1/TCP1/RUVBL1).

program_label: Early T-cell activation / TCR-signaling coupled with SAGA (Stim8hr-gated)
label_basis: Stim8hr-gated (CI). Downstream enriched for the EMPIRICAL TCR-signaling program markers (fingerprint_program_markers.csv 'TCR signaling|up'): 3/10 top genes = GPSM3/LIMD2/MYL12A, hypergeometric p=1.9e-5; full set (CORO1A/ARPC1B/MAP4K1/SAMHD1/CNN2) = leukocyte actin+T-signaling effectors; SVD raw-PC3 top / varimax-PC2 corroboration. NB: the CURATED proximal set TCR_PROXIMAL (ZAP70/LCK/LAT...) shows 0 overlap in operator_cp_enrichment_3106.csv - expected and non-contradictory: factor 6's DE-readout genes are downstream effectors, not proximal kinases. This is a COUPLING of two things: early activation (CD28 costim, SLC3A2/CD98hc) + SAGA chromatin. SAGA part anchored on cis-clean SUPT20H (Step1: rose #4->#3, panel-robust) & panel-robust TAF6L; NOT TADA2B (Step1 cis-inflated #2->#93).
